name: ASRock B850I LIGHTNING WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C (DP Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Killer 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2 - USB 3.2 Gen2 10Gbps Type-A
shortName: ASRock B850I LIGHTNING WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: ASRock B850I LIGHTNING WIFI Mini-ITX motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for ultra-compact high-end builds.
